title: Response
description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema0.title: Reference Object
__schema0.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

examples.description: A user is a type of person.
A pet is a type of animal.
A pet is a type of animal.

__schema1.title: Reference
__schema1.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

__schema5.title: summary
__schema5.description: A short summary which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema6.title: description
__schema6.description: A description which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema8.title: Response
__schema8.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema12.title: Header
__schema12.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema13.title: Header
__schema13.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema14.title: description
__schema14.description: A brief description of the parameter.

__schema15.description: Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
__schema15.title: required

__schema17.description: Specifies that a parameter is deprecated.
__schema17.title: deprecated

__schema19.description: Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
__schema19.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema21.title: style
__schema21.description: Describes how the parameter value will be serialized.

__schema27.title: Schema Object
__schema27.description: A Schema Object defines the shape of a JSON value.

__schema28.title: String Object
__schema28.description: A String Object defines the shape of a string value.

__schema29.title: title
__schema29.description: A title for the schema, used for documentation.

__schema30.title: description
__schema30.description: A description of the schema. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema31.title: default
__schema31.description: The default value for this schema.

__schema32.title: example
__schema32.description: An example value for this schema.

__schema33.title: enum
__schema33.description: An array of valid values for this schema.

__schema35.title: const
__schema35.description: A constant value that this schema must match.

__schema37.title: Discriminator
__schema37.description: When request bodies or response payloads may be one of a number of different schemas, a discriminator object can be used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.

__schema38.title: propertyName
__schema38.description: The name of the property in the payload that will hold the discriminator value.

__schema39.title: mapping
__schema39.description: An object to hold mappings between payload values and schema names or references.

__schema44.title: XML
__schema44.description: A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.

__schema45.title: name
__schema45.description: Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.

__schema46.title: namespace
__schema46.description: The URI of the namespace definition.

__schema47.title: prefix
__schema47.description: The prefix to be used for the name.

__schema48.description: Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
__schema48.title: attribute

__schema50.description: May be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped or not.
__schema50.title: wrapped

__schema54.title: ExternalDocumentation
__schema54.description: Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.

__schema55.title: description
__schema55.description: A short description of the target documentation.

__schema56.title: url
__schema56.description: The URL for the target documentation.

__schema58.title: readOnly
__schema58.description: When true, the property is only returned in responses, not accepted in requests.

__schema59.title: writeOnly
__schema59.description: When true, the property is only accepted in requests, not returned in responses.

__schema60.title: deprecated
__schema60.description: When true, indicates this schema is deprecated and should be avoided.

__schema61.title: nullable
__schema61.description: OpenAPI 3.0: Set to true to allow null values.

__schema63.title: format
__schema63.description: Semantic format hint for string values. Common formats: date-time, email, uuid, uri, hostname, ipv4, byte, binary.

__schema64.title: Pattern
__schema64.description: A regular expression pattern the string must match.

__schema70.title: Number Object
__schema70.description: A Number Object defines the shape of a number value.

__schema72.title: format
__schema72.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema73.title: multipleOf
__schema73.description: Require the number to be a multiple of this value.

__schema75.title: minimum
__schema75.description: Inclusive lower bound for the number.

__schema77.title: maximum
__schema77.description: Inclusive upper bound for the number.

__schema79.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema79.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema81.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema81.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema83.title: Integer Object
__schema83.description: An Integer Object defines the shape of an integer value.

__schema85.title: format
__schema85.description: Integer size format. Use 'int32' for signed 32-bit (-2B to 2B) or 'int64' for signed 64-bit integers.

__schema86.title: multipleOf
__schema86.description: Require the integer to be a multiple of this value.

__schema88.title: minimum
__schema88.description: Inclusive lower bound for the integer.

__schema90.title: maximum
__schema90.description: Inclusive upper bound for the integer.

__schema92.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema92.description: Exclusive lower bound (instance must be > this value).

__schema94.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema94.description: Exclusive upper bound (instance must be < this value).

__schema96.title: Boolean Object
__schema96.description: A Boolean Object defines the shape of a boolean value.

__schema98.title: Array Object
__schema98.description: An Array Object defines the shape of an array value.

__schema102.title: prefixItems
__schema102.description: Tuple validation: schemas for items by index (array position).

__schema104.title: contains
__schema104.description: Require the array to contain at least one item matching this subschema.

__schema116.title: Object Object
__schema116.description: An Object Object defines the shape of an object value.

__schema140.title: Composition Schema
__schema140.description: A schema using composition keywords (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not) without a type constraint.

__schema141.title: allOf
__schema141.description: Require the instance to validate against all subschemas.

__schema143.title: anyOf
__schema143.description: Require the instance to validate against at least one subschema.

__schema145.title: oneOf
__schema145.description: Require the instance to validate against exactly one subschema.

__schema147.title: not
__schema147.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema158.title: externalValue
__schema158.description: A URL that points to the literal example.

__schema166.title: MediaType
__schema166.description: Each Media Type Object provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.

__schema174.title: Encoding
__schema174.description: A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.

__schema175.title: contentType
__schema175.description: The Content-Type for encoding a specific property.

__schema191.title: Link
__schema191.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema192.title: Link
__schema192.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema193.title: operationId
__schema193.description: The name of an existing, resolvable OAS operation, as defined with a unique operationId.

__schema194.title: operationRef
__schema194.description: A relative or absolute URI reference to an OAS operation.

__schema195.title: parameters
__schema195.description: A map representing parameters to pass to an operation as specified with operationId or identified via operationRef.

__schema198.title: requestBody
__schema198.description: A literal value or {expression} to use as a request body when calling the target operation.

__schema201.title: url
__schema201.description: A URL to the target host. Supports server variables in {braces}. May be relative.

__schema202.title: description
__schema202.description: An optional description of the server.

__schema203.title: variables
__schema203.description: A map of server variables for URL template substitution.

__schema205.title: ServerVariable
__schema205.description: A server variable for URL template substitution. Use {variableName} in the server URL.

__schema206.title: enum
__schema206.description: An enumeration of valid string values for this variable.

__schema208.title: default
__schema208.description: The default value for substitution if not supplied.

__schema209.title: description
__schema209.description: An optional description for the server variable.
